creator: ladyandhersweetescapes
caption:
FREE spots to visit in Dubai [Part 2]

⛲️Burj Park - a lovely public park nestled in the middle of Downtown Dubai. It has excellent views of Burj Khalifa and Dubai Fountain, and lots of photo spots!

🌳Keturah Reserve - a luxury real estate development in Nad Al Sheeba. There are cafes, restaurants, vintage cars, and a super IG-worthy pavement lined with olive trees!

🌊Dubai Canal - a picturesque waterway with instagrammable pedestrian bridges and good views of Dubai skyline. 

🏖️Umm Suqeim Beach - also known as Sunset Beach. It’s a popular public beach in Dubai right next to Burj Al Arab. 

Tag your besties and plan your next day out!
